DESCRIPTION: The KONG Classic is the gold standard of dog toys and has become the benchmark against which all other dog toys are measured. Made from unique all-natural rubber, ideal for dogs that like to chew.
Made from the strongest rubber compound available, recommended for the most powerful and determined chewers. Perfect for large and extra-large dog breeds that need a durable outlet.
Specially designed for puppies, made from a gentle pink rubber formula that satisfies a puppy natural need to chew while supporting proper dental development and healthy chewing habits.
A treat-dispensing toy that provides mental stimulation and rewards dogs. It wobbles, spins, and rolls to dispense kibble or treats, keeping dogs engaged and entertained for extended periods.
Made with a thick high-bounce natural rubber core that floats in water and is easy to clean. Compatible with all Chuckit! ball launchers for an extended throw every single time.
Lets you throw farther with less effort, keeping your hands clean and dry. Holds standard and medium balls, features a one-handed scoop and launch mechanism, and collapses for easy storage.
A uniquely shaped fetch toy that rolls and bounces unpredictably, making every game of fetch more exciting. Made from durable high-bounce rubber that is perfect for both land and water play.
Designed for powerful chewers and made from tough nylon material. The textured surface helps clean teeth and control plaque and tartar buildup as your dog enthusiastically chews.
A variety pack of chew toys perfect for teething puppies. The soft flexible nylon material soothes sore gums and encourages healthy chewing habits right from the very first day.
Infused with a savory bacon flavor to keep dogs interested and chewing for hours. Made specifically for aggressive chewers and promotes good dental health by reducing plaque and tartar buildup.
A no-stuffing squeaky plush toy that eliminates the mess of stuffing all over your floor. Features two internal squeakers for added excitement and is made from durable soft plush material.
An interactive hide-and-seek plush toy where three squeaky hedgehogs tuck inside a plush log. Dogs love pulling the hedgehogs out and playing with each individual squeaky character.
A fun and festive tug toy shaped like a birthday cake. Made from durable braided rope with colorful plush accents, great for interactive play and helps clean teeth with every satisfying tug.
A stimulating puzzle toy that challenges dogs to find and remove squeaky squirrels from inside a plush tree trunk. Available in multiple sizes to suit dogs of all breeds and sizes.
A durable double-layered squeaky plush toy built to withstand aggressive play. Featuring Chew Shield Technology, this gecko keeps squeaking even when punctured for long-lasting entertainment.
